productDisplayName: Spinn Men Abzorb X Black Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Abzorb-X shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed shoe with a low ankle and high at the collar, has central lace upsPadded tongue and inner (with mesh)Tough plastic supports (elevated at the heel, acts as midsole)TPU outsole with waffle patterned lugs and suction points at the back foot regionMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
